# Contributing

Until the CI and contribution rules are fortified, this repository accepts only public issue reports:

- reproducible bug reports,
- actionable product, documentation, or workflow suggestions.

Use the [issue chooser](https://github.com/Borda/vision-delivery/issues/new/choose) to submit one. Describe the problem clearly and include only information you are authorized to make public.

## Pull requests are temporarily limited

Do not open an external pull request at this time. Maintainers accept pull requests only when a maintainer has explicitly requested one after discussing a specific issue. Uninvited pull requests may be closed without review while the project strengthens its CI coverage, contribution process, and review rules.

## Reporting safely

For a bug report, include the Sentinel version or commit, host and version, steps to reproduce, expected and actual behavior, and a minimal public-safe reproducer. For a suggestion, state the problem it solves, the affected user, and the outcome you expect.

Never include credentials, private customer data, sensitive media, or personal data. Report suspected vulnerabilities through the [security policy](SECURITY.md), not a public issue.

By participating, you agree to follow the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
